title: Email Marketing for E-commerce: Boosting Sales with Automated Campaigns
author: Nicole Martinez
excerpt: Discover how e-commerce businesses can leverage email marketing to increase sales, improve customer retention, and grow their online store.
content:
Email marketing is the secret weapon of successful e-commerce brands. With an average ROI of 36:1, email outperforms all other marketing channels for online retailers. In this guide, we'll explore the automated campaigns that drive e-commerce success.

E-commerce email marketing generates $0.08 of revenue per email sent. For a list of 100,000 subscribers, that's $8,000 per email.

Essential E-commerce Email Campaigns

Automation is key to e-commerce email success. Set up these essential campaigns to maximize revenue with minimal ongoing effort.

High-Impact Automated Sequences

Welcome Series

Introduce your brand, showcase bestsellers, and offer a first-purchase discount.

Abandoned Cart

Recover an average of 15% of lost revenue with timely reminders.

Post-Purchase

Confirm orders, request reviews, and suggest complementary products.

Win-Back Campaigns

Re-engage customers who haven't purchased in 90+ days.

Product Recommendation Emails

Leverage purchase history and browsing behavior to send personalized product recommendations. These emails consistently outperform generic promotional emails.

At Laravel Mail, we make it easy to set up sophisticated product recommendation engines.

Segment your customers by purchase history, average order value, and product categories to deliver highly relevant recommendations.

Seasonal Campaigns

Plan your year around key shopping seasons: Black Friday, Cyber Monday, Valentine's Day, back-to-school, and holiday gift guides. Start planning early and build anticipation.

Supercharge your e-commerce with Laravel Mail's powerful automation tools.
